NKJV.1: A Psalm of David when he pretended madness before Abimelech, who drove him away, and he departed. I will bless the LORD at all times; His praise shall continually be in my mouth.
NKJV.2: My soul shall make its boast in the LORD; The humble shall hear of it and be glad.
NKJV.3: Oh, magnify the LORD with me, And let us exalt His name together.
NKJV.4: I sought the LORD, and He heard me, And delivered me from all my fears.
NKJV.5: They looked to Him and were radiant, And their faces were not ashamed.
NKJV.6: This poor man cried out, and the LORD heard him, And saved him out of all his troubles.
NKJV.7: The angel of the LORD encamps all around those who fear Him, And delivers them.
NKJV.8: Oh, taste and see that the LORD is good; Blessed is the man who trusts in Him!
NKJV.9: Oh, fear the LORD, you His saints! There is no want to those who fear Him.
NKJV.10: The young lions lack and suffer hunger; But those who seek the LORD shall not lack any good thing.
NKJV.11: Come, you children, listen to me;  I will teach you the fear of the LORD.
NKJV.12: Who is the man who desires life, And loves many days, that he may see good?
NKJV.13: Keep your tongue from evil, And your lips from speaking deceit.
NKJV.14: Depart from evil and do good;  Seek peace and pursue it.
NKJV.15: The eyes of the LORD are on the righteous, And His ears are open to their cry.
NKJV.16: The face of the LORD is against those who do evil, To cut off the remembrance of them from the earth.
NKJV.17: The righteous cry out, and the LORD hears, And delivers them out of all their troubles.
NKJV.18: The LORD is near to those who have a broken heart, And saves such as have a contrite spirit.
NKJV.19: Many are the afflictions of the righteous, But the LORD delivers him out of them all.
NKJV.20: He guards all his bones;  Not one of them is broken.
NKJV.21: Evil shall slay the wicked, And those who hate the righteous shall be condemned.
NKJV.22: The LORD redeems the soul of His servants, And none of those who trust in Him shall be condemned.

KJV.12: What man<S>376</S> is he that desireth<S>2655</S> life<S>2416</S>, and loveth<S>157</S> many days<S>3117</S>, that he may see<S>7200</S> good<S>2896</S>?

KJV.15: The eyes<S>5869</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> are upon the righteous<S>6662</S>, and his ears<S>241</S> are open unto their cry<S>7775</S>.
KJV.16: The face<S>6440</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> is against them that do<S>6213</S> evil<S>7451</S>, to cut off<S>3772</S> the remembrance<S>2143</S> of them from the earth<S>776</S>.
KJV.17: The righteous cry<S>6817</S>, and the LORD<S>3068</S> heareth<S>8085</S>, and delivereth<S>5337</S> them out of all their troubles<S>6869</S>.

ESV.1: I will bless the LORD at all times; his praise shall continually be in my mouth.
ESV.2: My soul makes its boast in the LORD; let the humble hear and be glad.
ESV.3: Oh, magnify the LORD with me, and let us exalt his name together!
ESV.4: I sought the LORD, and he answered me and delivered me from all my fears.
ESV.5: Those who look to him are radiant, and their faces shall never be ashamed.
ESV.6: This poor man cried, and the LORD heard him and saved him out of all his troubles.
ESV.7: The angel of the LORD encamps around those who fear him, and delivers them.
ESV.8: Oh, taste and see that the LORD is good! Blessed is the man who takes refuge in him!
ESV.9: Oh, fear the LORD, you his saints, for those who fear him have no lack!
ESV.10: The young lions suffer want and hunger; but those who seek the LORD lack no good thing.
ESV.11: Come, O children, listen to me; I will teach you the fear of the LORD.
ESV.12: What man is there who desires life and loves many days, that he may see good?
ESV.13: Keep your tongue from evil and your lips from speaking deceit.
ESV.14: Turn away from evil and do good; seek peace and pursue it.
ESV.15: The eyes of the LORD are toward the righteous and his ears toward their cry.
ESV.16: The face of the LORD is against those who do evil, to cut off the memory of them from the earth.
ESV.17: When the righteous cry for help, the LORD hears and delivers them out of all their troubles.
ESV.18: The LORD is near to the brokenhearted and saves the crushed in spirit.
ESV.19: Many are the afflictions of the righteous, but the LORD delivers him out of them all.
ESV.20: He keeps all his bones; not one of them is broken.
ESV.21: Affliction will slay the wicked, and those who hate the righteous will be condemned.
ESV.22: The LORD redeems the life of his servants; none of those who take refuge in him will be condemned.

NASB.1: [A Psalm] of David when he feigned madness before Abimelech, who drove him away and he departed. I will bless the LORD at all times; His praise shall continually be in my mouth.
NASB.2: My soul will make its boast in the LORD; The humble will hear it and rejoice.
NASB.3: O magnify the LORD with me, And let us exalt His name together.
NASB.4: I sought the LORD, and He answered me, And delivered me from all my fears.
NASB.5: They looked to Him and were radiant, And their faces will never be ashamed.
NASB.6: This poor man cried, and the LORD heard him And saved him out of all his troubles.
NASB.7: The angel of the LORD encamps around those who fear Him, And rescues them.
NASB.8: O taste and see that the LORD is good; How blessed is the man who takes refuge in Him!
NASB.9: O fear the LORD, you His saints; For to those who fear Him there is no want.
NASB.10: The young lions do lack and suffer hunger; But they who seek the LORD shall not be in want of any good thing.
NASB.11: Come, you children, listen to me; I will teach you the fear of the LORD.
NASB.12: Who is the man who desires life And loves [length of] days that he may see good?
NASB.13: Keep your tongue from evil And your lips from speaking deceit.
NASB.14: Depart from evil and do good; Seek peace and pursue it.
NASB.15: The eyes of the LORD are toward the righteous And His ears are [open] to their cry.
NASB.16: The face of the LORD is against evildoers, To cut off the memory of them from the earth.
NASB.17: [The righteous] cry, and the LORD hears And delivers them out of all their troubles.
NASB.18: The LORD is near to the brokenhearted And saves those who are crushed in spirit.
NASB.19: Many are the afflictions of the righteous, But the LORD delivers him out of them all.
NASB.20: He keeps all his bones, Not one of them is broken.
NASB.21: Evil shall slay the wicked, And those who hate the righteous will be condemned.
NASB.22: The LORD redeems the soul of His servants, And none of those who take refuge in Him will be condemned.

NLT.1:
I will praise the LORD at all times.
I will constantly speak his praises.
NLT.2:
I will boast only in the LORD;
let all who are helpless take heart.
NLT.3:
Come, let us tell of the LORD’s greatness;
let us exalt his name together.
NLT.4:
I prayed to the LORD, and he answered me.
He freed me from all my fears.
NLT.5:
Those who look to him for help will be radiant with joy;
no shadow of shame will darken their faces.
NLT.6:
In my desperation I prayed, and the LORD listened;
he saved me from all my troubles.
NLT.7:
For the angel of the LORD is a guard;
he surrounds and defends all who fear him.
NLT.8:
Taste and see that the LORD is good.
Oh, the joys of those who take refuge in him!
NLT.9:
Fear the LORD, you his godly people,
for those who fear him will have all they need.
NLT.10:
Even strong young lions sometimes go hungry,
but those who trust in the LORD will lack no good thing.
NLT.11:
Come, my children, and listen to me,
and I will teach you to fear the LORD.
NLT.12:
Does anyone want to live a life
that is long and prosperous?
NLT.13:
Then keep your tongue from speaking evil
and your lips from telling lies!
NLT.14:
Turn away from evil and do good.
Search for peace, and work to maintain it.
NLT.15:
The eyes of the LORD watch over those who do right;
his ears are open to their cries for help.
NLT.16:
But the LORD turns his face against those who do evil;
he will erase their memory from the earth.
NLT.17:
The LORD hears his people when they call to him for help.
He rescues them from all their troubles.
NLT.18:
The LORD is close to the brokenhearted;
he rescues those whose spirits are crushed.
NLT.19:
The righteous person faces many troubles,
but the LORD comes to the rescue each time.
NLT.20:
For the LORD protects the bones of the righteous;
not one of them is broken!
NLT.21:
Calamity will surely destroy the wicked,
and those who hate the righteous will be punished.
NLT.22:
But the LORD will redeem those who serve him.
No one who takes refuge in him will be condemned.

WEB.1: By David; when he pretended to be insane before Abimelech, who drove him away, and he departed. I will bless Yahweh at all times. His praise will always be in my mouth.
WEB.2: My soul shall boast in Yahweh. The humble shall hear of it, and be glad.
WEB.3: Oh magnify Yahweh with me. Let us exalt his name together.
WEB.4: I sought Yahweh, and he answered me, and delivered me from all my fears.
WEB.5: They looked to him, and were radiant. Their faces shall never be covered with shame.
WEB.6: This poor man cried, and Yahweh heard him, and saved him out of all his troubles.
WEB.7: Yahweh’s angel encamps around those who fear him, and delivers them.
WEB.8: Oh taste and see that Yahweh is good. Blessed is the man who takes refuge in him.
WEB.9: Oh fear Yahweh, you his saints, for there is no lack with those who fear him.
WEB.10: The young lions do lack, and suffer hunger, but those who seek Yahweh shall not lack any good thing.
WEB.11: Come, you children, listen to me. I will teach you the fear of Yahweh.
WEB.12: Who is someone who desires life, and loves many days, that he may see good?
WEB.13: Keep your tongue from evil, and your lips from speaking lies.
WEB.14: Depart from evil, and do good. seek peace, and pursue it.
WEB.15: Yahweh’s eyes are toward the righteous. His ears listen to their cry.
WEB.16: Yahweh’s face is against those who do evil, to cut off their memory from the earth.
WEB.17: The righteous cry, and Yahweh hears, and delivers them out of all their troubles.
WEB.18: Yahweh is near to those who have a broken heart, and saves those who have a crushed spirit.
WEB.19: Many are the afflictions of the righteous, but Yahweh delivers him out of them all.
WEB.20: He protects all of his bones. Not one of them is broken.
WEB.21: Evil shall kill the wicked. Those who hate the righteous shall be condemned.
WEB.22: Yahweh redeems the soul of his servants. None of those who take refuge in him shall be condemned.

CSB17.1:

his praise will always be on my lips. ⓝ
CSB17.2:
I will boast in the LORD; ⓐ
the humble will hear and be glad. ⓑ

I sought the LORD, and he answered me
and rescued me from all my fears. ⓔ

Those who look to him are [1] radiant with joy; ⓕ
their faces will never be ashamed. ⓖ
CSB17.6:
This poor man cried, and the LORD heard him
and saved him from all his troubles. ⓗ
CSB17.7:
The angel of the LORD encamps
around those who fear him, and rescues them. ⓘ
CSB17.8:
Taste and see that the LORD is good. ⓙ
How happy is the person who takes refuge in him! ⓚ
CSB17.9:
You who are his holy ones, fear the LORD,
for those who fear him lack nothing. ⓛ
CSB17.10:
Young lions [2] lack food and go hungry, ⓜ
but those who seek the LORD
will not lack any good thing. ⓝ
CSB17.11:
Come, children, listen to me;
I will teach you the fear of the LORD. ⓐ
CSB17.12:
Who is someone who desires life,
loving a long life to enjoy what is good? ⓑ
CSB17.13:
Keep your tongue from evil
and your lips from deceitful speech. ⓒ
CSB17.14:
Turn away from evil and do what is good; ⓓ
seek peace and pursue it. ⓔ
CSB17.15:
The eyes of the LORD are on the righteous,
and his ears are open to their cry for help. ⓕ
CSB17.16:
The face of the LORD is set
against those who do what is evil, ⓖ
to remove [3] all memory of them from the earth. ⓗ
CSB17.17:
The righteous [4] cry out, and the LORD hears,
and rescues them from all their troubles. ⓘ
CSB17.18:
The LORD is near the brokenhearted;
he saves those crushed in spirit. ⓙ
CSB17.19:
One who is righteous has many adversities,
but the LORD rescues him from them all. ⓚ
CSB17.20:
He protects all his bones;
not one of them is broken. ⓛ
CSB17.21:
Evil brings death to the wicked,
and those who hate the righteous will be punished. ⓜ
CSB17.22:
The LORD redeems the life of his servants,
and all who take refuge in him will not be punished. ⓝ

AMP.1:
A Psalm of David; when he pretended to be insane before Abimelech, who drove him out, and he went away. I will bless the LORD at all times;
His praise shall continually be in my mouth.
AMP.2:
My soul makes its boast in the LORD;
The humble and downtrodden will hear it and rejoice.
AMP.3:
O magnify the LORD with me,
And let us lift up His name together.
AMP.4:
I sought the LORD [on the authority of His word], and He answered me,
And delivered me from all my fears.
AMP.5:
They looked to Him and were radiant;
Their faces will never blush in shame or confusion.
AMP.6:
This poor man cried, and the LORD heard him
And saved him from all his troubles.
AMP.7:
The angel of the LORD encamps around those who fear Him [with awe-inspired reverence and worship Him with obedience],
And He rescues [each of] them.
AMP.8:
O taste and see that the LORD [our God] is good;
How blessed [fortunate, prosperous, and favored by God] is the man who takes refuge in Him.
AMP.9:
O [reverently] fear the LORD, you His saints (believers, holy ones);
For to those who fear Him there is no want.
AMP.10:
The young lions lack [food] and grow hungry,
But they who seek the LORD will not lack any good thing.
AMP.11:
Come, you children, listen to me;
I will teach you to fear the LORD [with awe-inspired reverence and worship Him with obedience].
AMP.12:
Who is the man who desires life
And loves many days, that he may see good?
AMP.13:
Keep your tongue from evil
And your lips from speaking deceit.
AMP.14:
Turn away from evil and do good;
Seek peace and pursue it.
AMP.15:
The eyes of the LORD are toward the righteous [those with moral courage and spiritual integrity]
And His ears are open to their cry.
AMP.16:
The face of the LORD is against those who do evil,
To cut off the memory of them from the earth.
AMP.17:
When the righteous cry [for help], the LORD hears
And rescues them from all their distress and troubles.
AMP.18:
The LORD is near to the heartbroken
And He saves those who are crushed in spirit (contrite in heart, truly sorry for their sin).
AMP.19:
Many hardships and perplexing circumstances confront the righteous,
But the LORD rescues him from them all.
AMP.20:
He keeps all his bones;
Not one of them is broken.
AMP.21:
Evil will cause the death of the wicked,
And those who hate the righteous will be held guilty and will be condemned.
AMP.22:
The LORD redeems the soul of His servants,
And none of those who take refuge in Him will be condemned.

MSG.1:
A David psalm, when he outwitted Abimelech and got away.
I bless God every chance I get;
my lungs expand with his praise.
MSG.2:
I live and breathe God;
if things aren't going well, hear this and be happy:
MSG.3:
Join me in spreading the news;
together let's get the word out.
MSG.4:
God met me more than halfway,
he freed me from my anxious fears.
MSG.5:
Look at him; give him your warmest smile.
Never hide your feelings from him.
MSG.6:
When I was desperate, I called out,
and God got me out of a tight spot.
MSG.7:
God's angel sets up a circle
of protection around us while we pray.
MSG.8:
Open your mouth and taste, open your eyes and see—
how good God is.
Blessed are you who run to him.
MSG.9:
Worship God if you want the best;
worship opens doors to all his goodness.
MSG.10:
Young lions on the prowl get hungry,
but God-seekers are full of God.
MSG.11:
Come, children, listen closely;
I'll give you a lesson in God worship.
MSG.12:
Who out there has a lust for life?
Can't wait each day to come upon beauty?
MSG.13:
Guard your tongue from profanity,
and no more lying through your teeth.
MSG.14:
Turn your back on sin; do something good.
Embrace peace—don't let it get away!
MSG.15:
God keeps an eye on his friends,
his ears pick up every moan and groan.
MSG.16:
God won't put up with rebels;
he'll cull them from the pack.
MSG.17:
Is anyone crying for help? God is listening,
ready to rescue you.
MSG.18:
If your heart is broken, you'll find God right there;
if you're kicked in the gut, he'll help you catch your breath.
MSG.19:
Disciples so often get into trouble;
still, God is there every time.
MSG.20:
He's your bodyguard, shielding every bone;
not even a finger gets broken.
MSG.21:
The wicked commit slow suicide;
they waste their lives hating the good.
MSG.22:
God pays for each slave's freedom;
no one who runs to him loses out.

NIV.1:
Psalm 34
Of David. When he pretended to be insane before Abimelech, who drove him away, and he left.
I will extol the Lord at all times;
his praise will always be on my lips.
NIV.2:
My soul will boast in the Lord;
let the afflicted hear and rejoice.
NIV.3:
Glorify the Lord with me;
let us exalt his name together.
NIV.4:
I sought the Lord, and he answered me;
he delivered me from all my fears.
NIV.5:
Those who look to him are radiant;
their faces are never covered with shame.
NIV.6:
This poor man called, and the Lord heard him;
he saved him out of all his troubles.
NIV.7:
The angel of the Lord encamps around those who fear him,
and he delivers them.
NIV.8:
Taste and see that the Lord is good;
blessed is the man who takes refuge in him.
NIV.9:
Fear the Lord, you his saints,
for those who fear him lack nothing.
NIV.10:
The lions may grow weak and hungry,
but those who seek the Lord lack no good thing.
NIV.11:
Come, my children, listen to me;
I will teach you the fear of the Lord.
NIV.12:
Whoever of you loves life
and desires to see many good days,
NIV.13:
keep your tongue from evil
and your lips from speaking lies.
NIV.14:
Turn from evil and do good;
seek peace and pursue it.
NIV.15:
The eyes of the Lord are on the righteous
and his ears are attentive to their cry;
NIV.16:
the face of the Lord is against those who do evil,
to cut off the memory of them from the earth.
NIV.17:
The righteous cry out, and the Lord hears them;
he delivers them from all their troubles.
NIV.18:
The Lord is close to the brokenhearted
and saves those who are crushed in spirit.
NIV.19:
A righteous man may have many troubles,
but the Lord delivers him from them all;
NIV.20:
he protects all his bones,
not one of them will be broken.
NIV.21:
Evil will slay the wicked;
the foes of the righteous will be condemned.
NIV.22:
The Lord redeems his servants;
no one will be condemned who takes refuge in him.

NRSVCE.1:
I will bless the LORD at all times;
his praise shall continually be in my mouth.
NRSVCE.2:
My soul makes its boast in the LORD;
let the humble hear and be glad.
NRSVCE.3:
O magnify the LORD with me,
and let us exalt his name together.
NRSVCE.4:
I sought the LORD, and he answered me,
and delivered me from all my fears.
NRSVCE.5:
Look to him, and be radiant;
so your faces shall never be ashamed.
NRSVCE.6:
This poor soul cried, and was heard by the LORD,
and was saved from every trouble.
NRSVCE.7:
The angel of the LORD encamps
around those who fear him, and delivers them.
NRSVCE.8:
O taste and see that the LORD is good;
happy are those who take refuge in him.
NRSVCE.9:
O fear the LORD, you his holy ones,
for those who fear him have no want.
NRSVCE.10:
The young lions suffer want and hunger,
but those who seek the LORD lack no good thing.
NRSVCE.11:
Come, O children, listen to me;
I will teach you the fear of the LORD.
NRSVCE.12:
Which of you desires life,
and covets many days to enjoy good?
NRSVCE.13:
Keep your tongue from evil,
and your lips from speaking deceit.
NRSVCE.14:
Depart from evil, and do good;
seek peace, and pursue it.
NRSVCE.15:
The eyes of the LORD are on the righteous,
and his ears are open to their cry.
NRSVCE.16:
The face of the LORD is against evildoers,
to cut off the remembrance of them from the earth.
NRSVCE.17:
When the righteous cry for help, the LORD hears,
and rescues them from all their troubles.
NRSVCE.18:
The LORD is near to the brokenhearted,
and saves the crushed in spirit.
NRSVCE.19:
Many are the afflictions of the righteous,
but the LORD rescues them from them all.
NRSVCE.20:
He keeps all their bones;
not one of them will be broken.
NRSVCE.21:
Evil brings death to the wicked,
and those who hate the righteous will be condemned.
NRSVCE.22:
The LORD redeems the life of his servants;
none of those who take refuge in him will be condemned.

NET.1: I will praise the LORD at all times; my mouth will continually praise him.
NET.2: I will boast in the LORD; let the oppressed hear and rejoice!
NET.3: Magnify the LORD with me! Let’s praise his name together!
NET.4: I sought the LORD’s help and he answered me; he delivered me from all my fears.
NET.5: Those who look to him for help are happy; their faces are not ashamed.
NET.6: This oppressed man cried out and the LORD heard; he saved him from all his troubles.
NET.7: The LORD’s angel camps around the LORD’s loyal followers and delivers them.
NET.8: Taste and see that the LORD is good! How blessed is the one who takes shelter in him!
NET.9: Remain loyal to the LORD, you chosen people of his, for his loyal followers lack nothing!
NET.10: Even young lions sometimes lack food and are hungry, but those who seek the LORD lack no good thing.
NET.11: Come children! Listen to me! I will teach you what it means to fear the LORD.
NET.12: Do you want to really live? Would you love to live a long, happy life?
NET.13: Then make sure you don’t speak evil words or use deceptive speech!
NET.14: Turn away from evil and do what is right! Strive for peace and promote it!
NET.15: The LORD pays attention to the godly and hears their cry for help.
NET.16: But the LORD opposes evildoers and wipes out all memory of them from the earth.
NET.17: The godly cry out and the LORD hears; he saves them from all their troubles.
NET.18: The LORD is near the brokenhearted; he delivers those who are discouraged.
NET.19: The godly face many dangers, but the LORD saves them from each one of them.
NET.20: He protects all his bones; not one of them is broken.
NET.21: Evil people self-destruct; those who hate the godly are punished.
NET.22: The LORD rescues his servants; all who take shelter in him escape punishment.
